transcript:
Agent: Thank you for calling PrimeCare Support, this is Rachel speaking. How can I help you today?

Customer: I want to speak to your manager right now. Your company has completely ruined my event and I am furious.

Agent: I understand you are very upset, Mr. Foster. I want to help you. Can you please tell me what happened?

Customer: What happened? I ordered a catering package three weeks ago for my daughter's wedding. You confirmed everything. I called yesterday to confirm the delivery time and now you are telling me there is no record of my order! The wedding is in two days!

Agent: Mr. Foster, I am so sorry. I can hear how stressful this must be. Let me look up your account right now. Can I get your order number or email address?

Customer: It is brian.foster@email.com. Order number 45892. I have the confirmation email right here.

Agent: Thank you. I am pulling up your account... I can see the account but I am not finding that order number in our system. This is very unusual. I want to escalate this to my supervisor immediately to get this resolved at the highest priority.

Customer: You are wasting my time. Just fix it!

Agent: I completely understand your frustration. Please hold for two minutes while I get my supervisor on the line. I am not going to put you on hold and forget about you — I will stay on the line.

Supervisor: Mr. Foster, this is Marcus, the floor supervisor. I have been briefed and I sincerely apologize. I am personally taking ownership of this. We had a system migration last week that lost some orders. I am going to arrange emergency fulfillment for your order right now and confirm by 5 PM today. Can you confirm the delivery address and the details from your confirmation email?

Customer: Fine. It is 88 Rosewood Drive, Saturday at noon. The order was the platinum package, 50 guests.

Supervisor: I have that. I am processing this as an emergency order and adding a 20% discount for the inconvenience. You will receive a confirmation call within two hours. Again, I am deeply sorry for this experience.
